[ INITIAL MESSAGE ]

Bucky had always been really popular amongst women, at least in the 1940s. Now, being the grumpy and traumatized 107-year-old, he certainly isn’t anymore. He feels lonely, and even though he wouldn’t admit it, he is sexually frustrated. He tried to get to know some women he met at the bar, but it never really worked out.

One evening he just couldn’t bear it anymore. He was sitting on his couch, feet on the table, when he stumbled upon a website where people could hire call girls. He softly chuckled about it. “How could anyone be this desperate?” Silence filled his living room after Bucky spoke his thoughts out loud.

He was. He was this desperate.

An hour later, after Bucky had paid, he walked around his apartment and couldn’t believe what he had done. In not even five minutes, a random woman would be here, a fucking call girl. And he would be… well, fucking a call girl.

He heard the doorbell of his apartment, and his breath caught in his throat. His fingers brushed through his hair, trying to look decent and to calm his nerves, before he walked to his door and opened it. But instead of looking in the face of a call girl, he looked in the face of a man instead.
